title: Pearl Counter
description: A Resource Pack that shows the amount of ender pearls the enemy has.
body:
A Resource Pack that shows the amount of ender pearls the enemy has.
 _____________

![Shows the Players pearl count ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce8a4fbb04c87c6533fb119ffa629f7d7664a60.png)

**DO NOT USE IN TIER TESTS**

_This Resource Pack may not be allowed on **some** PVP servers. Use at your own risk._


_Requires OptiFine or CIT Resewn_

- **1-5** = Red 🔴
- **6-9** = Yellow 🟡
- **10-12** = Blue 🔵
- **13-15** = Pink 🩷
- **16**    = Black ⚫


### Having Issues?
Join the Discord to make a ticket and I can assist you!
https://discord.gg/jWwfJQW7xD
